title: RNG Quarterly Trendsheet Q4 2024
content: The Q4 2024 edition of RNG indicates steady growth from Q1 2024 to Q2 2025, with production projected to rise from 28.03 million MMBTUs in Q1 2024 to 36.06 million MMBTUs in Q2 2025. The U.S. remains the dominant producer, accounting for over 80% of total RNG production, while Canada's share experiences moderate growth.
author: Aru Somya
